slides.title: TrpB MetaDynamics — Path Definition Fix
slides.subtitle: Week 7: from parameter tuning to path geometry (FP-034)

slides.title: 本周目标 & 决策
slides.subtitle: Osuna 2019 严格复刻不是新方法发明
bullets: This project replicates JACS 2019; not inventing a new enhanced-sampling method
Path-definition 是真正的 replication blocker — 不是 MetaD 参数
HEIGHT / BIASFACTOR / SIGMA / LAMBDA 都无法救一条 geometry 错的 path
(1) single-walker 多次失败 → (2) Miguel 作者邮件 contract → (3) FP-034 sequence-aligned path fix → (4) 10-walker production gate
slides.footer: Slide 1 / 9  ·  scope & decision log  ·  see NEXT_ACTIONS.md

slides.title: 上周末状态 & 卡点 — single-walker 仍然 stuck
slides.subtitle: Three failed probes on the naive (numeric-resid-aligned) path
bullets: 7.7 ns 后停在 max s(R) = 1.75 ; never escaped O basin
z(R) rose 3.4× while s(R) did not move — walls 并非 blocker (证伪)
5DW0 / 5DW3 / 5DVZ all project to s ≈ 1.07 — partially-closed 晶体 无法从 path 上区分

bullets.text: Diagnosis → path geometry 是主嫌疑

slides.code:
# Naive path — all three PC crystals collapse to O endpoint
5DW0_A  s=1.07  z=+0.0245 nm^2
5DW3_A  s=1.07  z=+0.0231 nm^2
5DVZ_A  s=1.07  z=+0.0173 nm^2
# s barely distinguishes them from 1WDW_B (s=1.09)

slides.title: Miguel 作者邮件 contract (2026-04-23)
slides.subtitle: Osuna-lab first-author reply — parameter set authoritative
slides.code:
# Miguel's METAD line (verbatim extract)
UNITS         LENGTH=A  ENERGY=kcal/mol
ADAPTIVE      DIFF            # NOT GEOM  (FP-031)
HEIGHT        0.15 / 0.3 kcal/mol
BIASFACTOR    10 / 15
WALKERS_N     10
LAMBDA        80 (A^-2)       # self-consistent on their path
UPPER_WALLS   ARG=path.zzz  AT=2.5
bullets: ADAPTIVE = DIFF, not GEOM → fixes FP-031 (adaptive σ projected wrong axis)
UNITS = A / kcal — not nm / kJ (FP-032 SIGMA-unit bookkeeping)
10 walkers with HEIGHT=0.15 kcal/mol, BF=10 (production set)
Miguel's LAMBDA=80 is self-consistent on his path — not a universal constant. Must re-derive per-path.
slides.footer: Slide 3 / 9  ·  Miguel contract  ·  FP-031 / FP-032 in failure-patterns.md

slides.title: 诊断顺序 — 我们排除的假设
slides.subtitle: Before touching path geometry, ruled out 3 parameter-level hypotheses

rows: 13.6 kcal/mol (~19 kT) and still no escape
Codex audit of PLUMED source (multivariate Cholesky)
σ behavior is nominal — not pathological
walls did not contain the walker
project PC crystals + re-examine residue mapping

bullets.text: Only D remained after A/B/C were falsified — motivates FP-034 audit

bullets: Parameter tuning 不能修复 a physically-wrong path
Moved from METAD-line tuning to CV-construction audit

slides.title: FP-034 — cross-species residue mapping was wrong
slides.subtitle: 1WDW-B (Pf, 385 aa) vs 3CEP-B (St, 393 aa) differ by 5 N-terminal residues

leftBox.heading: Naive path (what we had)
leftBox.body:
Resid-number alignment: 97 ↔ 97
Identity across 112 Cα: 6.2 %
O↔C RMSD: 10.89 Å
⟨MSD⟩ along path: 0.606 Å²
λ (1/⟨MSD⟩): 3.80 Å⁻²
→ path mixes 2 different residue sets

rightBox.heading: Sequence-aligned path (FP-034 fix)
rightBox.body:
NW alignment: uniform +5 offset
112 Cα mapped to true homologs
Identity: 59.0 %  (9.5×)
O↔C RMSD: 2.115 Å  (5.1× tighter)
⟨MSD⟩: 0.0228 Å²
λ: 100.79 Å⁻²

bullets: Line 182 did compute a Needleman-Wunsch alignment — but line 670 never consumed it
Code ran clean, produced a usable path.pdb, and the error only surfaced as sampling failure downstream
slides.footer: Slide 5 / 9  ·  FP-034 root cause  ·  the bug was silent for 3 weeks

slides.title: Needleman-Wunsch 修复结果
slides.subtitle: Sequence-aligned path: geometry consistent with Branduardi 2007 prescription

bullets.text: Our λ=100.79 is self-consistent with our corrected path

bullets: Miguel's 80 on his path → ours 100.79 on ours; 1.26× ratio acceptable per Branduardi 2007 criterion (λ ~ 2.3/⟨MSD⟩)
Both values satisfy the "Gaussian-width matches neighbor-frame spacing" requirement
sources: https://doi.org/10.1063/1.2432340 (Branduardi, Gervasio, Parrinello 2007, J. Chem. Phys. 126, 054103)
slides.footer: Slide 6 / 9  ·  λ = 100.79 Å⁻² · corrected path · 112 Cα mapped

slides.title: 生物学验证 — PC 晶体在 corrected path 上分布合理
slides.subtitle: Structures that should be mid-path actually sit mid-path now

bullets.text: Three βPC-labeled crystals now sit in mid-path (s = 5.4–9.5)

bullets: On the naive path they all collapsed to s ≈ 1.07 (indistinguishable from Open)
Codex independent verification: 7/8 projections PASS (one partial-CV-coverage informational)
slides.footer: Slide 7 / 9  ·  biological sanity check passes  ·  7/8 PASS

slides.title: Pilot 45515869 — 同 start.gro on corrected path
slides.subtitle: Same Ain cMD starting frame, same walker — only CV/path changed
bullets: s(R) = 7.09 — not 1.0 · the 500 ns cMD终态 actually sits mid-path
Within 110 ps walker reaches max s = 8.94
Old naive path: 7.7 ns to reach s = 1.75
≈ 500× qualitative acceleration on path traversal
Not claimed as replication success yet — only says "the CV now responds"
Production gate is max s(R) > 12 (Closed endpoint approach)
slides.code:
# Corrected path — pilot 45515869 early window
t=0      ps  s= 7.09  z=0.031
t=50     ps  s= 7.92  z=0.048
t=110    ps  s= 8.94  z=0.055
# Old path (45324928): s=1.75 only after 7.7 ns
slides.footer: Slide 8 / 9  ·  pilot 45515869 early signal  ·  gate: max s > 12

slides.title: Next week plan + decision gate
slides.subtitle: Corrected path + production gate (not yet replication success)

leftColumn.heading: Decision gate (this week)
bullets: Pilot reaches max s(R) > 12 → promote to 10-walker primary production
3 < max s < 12 → extend pilot to 2–5 ns, re-evaluate
Pilot stalls below s = 3 → debate: path still wrong, or HEIGHT too small?
Criterion anchored to Closed endpoint (s = 15.0) — not to a time budget

rightColumn.heading: 10-walker production config
bullets: HEIGHT = 0.15 kcal/mol, BIASFACTOR = 10 (Miguel contract lower edge)
10 walkers seeded from 500 ns Ain cMD at t = 50, 100, 150, ..., 500 ns
LAMBDA = 100.79 Å⁻² (our self-consistent value on corrected path)
UPPER_WALLS on path.zzz AT = 2.5 (Miguel)
Submit script ready on Longleaf: submit_walkers.sh (miguel_2026-04-23/)
Target: FES reconstruction + JACS 2019 Fig 2a comparison — timeline TBD pending pilot gate

slides.footer: Slide 9 / 9  ·  Q&A  ·  next milestone: 10-walker primary production
